name: Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt and sugar.
2. Add the grated cheddar cheese and blend well.
3. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
4. Combine the egg, skim milk and melted margarine.
5. Pour the liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened and no flour streaks remain.
6. Spoon the batter into muffin tins sprayed with non-stick spray, filling each tin about 2/3 full.
7. Bake at 400 degrees F. for 20 to 25 minutes or until done and lightly browned.
8. Serve warm.
